sys_script_fix.description:
A field that was previously used to contain a template run from a task was used to contain a template that ran a task. This change was done to preserver a field. The application now actually will run a template from a task and this field will be very confusing to implementers if this is not corrected. The logic has all been updated to use the u_parent_template where u_child_route_template was used before. All of our forms were protected. So, customers have not modified or used this field. This will allow us to allow customers to better use these fields.
In the same way, there was a field on the Template instance originally used to track the task that launched the template. In 2.2 this capabilty was turned off and implemented in a way that only allowed saving at the top and starting a stand alone template. The field in the Template table was named parent_task, but it was really the top task under the template instance run. In 2.5 saving below the top and running from a task was implemented. A new field was added for "Top Task" and the original field value really maps to that field name. This script should only run once and moves the values from the field "Parent Task" where they belong to the new "Top Task" field.
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.5 - MoveChildTempToParentTemp
